questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt:
Consider the following statements regarding the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement in India:

1. The National Designated Authority (NDA) for its implementation has been notified under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
2. The Ministry of New and Renewable Energy is the nodal ministry responsible for announcing the NDA.

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation:
Statement 1 is correct: The NDA for the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement has been notified under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
Statement 2 is incorrect: The Ministry of Environment, Forests, and Climate Change (MoEFCC) announced the NDA, not the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy.
questions.takeaway: The MoEFCC is the nodal ministry for the NDA under Article 6 of the Paris Agreement, and its implementation is backed by the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: The Ministry of Environment, Forests, and Climate Change (MoEFCC) announced the National Designated Authority (NDA) for the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement (2015) under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.

questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: The Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC) recently announced the National Designated Authority (NDA) for the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement. This authority has been constituted under the provisions of which of the following legislations?

options.text: The Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981

questions.explanation: The MoEFCC announced the National Designated Authority (NDA) for the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement (2015) under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986. While domestic carbon trading frameworks in India are often associated with the Energy Conservation Act, the specific nodal authority for international cooperation under Article 6 draws its statutory backing from the EPA, 1986.
questions.takeaway: The National Designated Authority (NDA) for Article 6 of the Paris Agreement is notified under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: The Ministry of Environment, Forests, and Climate Change (MoEFCC) announced the National Designated Authority (NDA) for the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement (2015) under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
